Package com.lulow.justtype.view.particles

  • Related Packages

    Description
    com.lulow.justtype.view

  • Class
    Description
    AshFX
    Particle emitter that spawns floating ash particles rising from the bottom of the screen.
    ConfettiFX
    Particle emitter that fires confetti from the left and right edges of the screen.
    IParticleEmitter
    Contract for a particle emitter that spawns and manages particles on a pane.
    ParticleEmitterAdapter
    Default no-op adapter for IParticleEmitter.
